assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to verify current versions (kubectl version), cluster health (kubectl get nodes, kubectl get pods), and node status (kubectl get nodes -o wide)

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 6 includes the exact command 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=$ZONE --project=$PROJECT_ID' and specifically checks for 1.33 availability

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: The runbook does not include any kubectl commands to check for deprecated APIs (like 'kubectl get --raw /metrics' or deprecation warnings) before upgrading

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 7 provides the exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --master --cluster-version=1.33 --zone=$ZONE --project=$PROJECT_ID'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 8 includes verification commands (kubectl version --short, gcloud container clusters describe) and mentions checking API server response and cluster status

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 9 and 11 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading each node pool (default-pool and workload-pool) using 'gcloud container clusters upgrade --node-pool='

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 9 and 11 include 'watch -n 30' commands to monitor node upgrade progress for both node pools

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook provides a direct 1.32→1.33 control plane upgrade and the node pool upgrades will automatically go to the latest available version

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation with commands to check node versions (kubectl get nodes -o wide), pod health (kubectl get pods --all-namespaces), and kube-system pods (kubectl get pods -n kube-system)

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: The runbook includes a 'Rollback (Emergency Only)' section that explains control plane cannot be rolled back and provides troubleshooting commands, though it notes extreme cases would require team lead consultation
